pages.backgroundImage: URL of the background image (leave empty string "" for no image)
headline: First line of the big headline
Second line of the big headline
Third line...
pages.highlight: The text inside the bright orange box

sections.accentColor: Hex color for the vertical bar (e.g., '#e84c0e')
sections.title: Title of the point (use \n for a line break)
sections.body: The descriptive paragraph for this point

sections.accentColor: You can add multiple points by copying this block
sections.title: Another title

pages.subtitle: The text next to the big number (use \n for line breaks)
pages.body: The smaller body text below the orange divider line

leftColumn.title: Title for the left column (e.g., 'LOW\nVALUE')
items: First item in the negative list
Second item in the negative list
leftColumn.cta: Text for the bottom left button

rightColumn.title: Title for the right column (e.g., 'HIGH\nVALUE')
items: First item in the positive list
Second item in the positive list
rightColumn.cta: Text for the bottom right button

headline.text: First word of the final phrase
Last word of the final phrase

cta.text: Text inside the big call-to-action bar
